caption: Respond to a property possession claim
question: Would you have somewhere else to live if you had to leave your home?
dateLabel: When would you be able to move in (optional)?

date.notRealDate: The date you’d be able to move in must be a real date
date.pastDate: The date you’d be able to move in must be in the future
date.invalidValue: The date you’d be able to move in must be a real date
date.missingOne: The date you’d be able to move in must include a {{missingField}}
date.missingTwo: The date you’d be able to move in must include a {{first}} and {{second}}
